---
title: "Projects"
---

<h2 class="section-header">Completed Projects</h2>

### Currency Crisis Prediction

<div class="project-content">
<div class="project-excerpt project-excerpt--blue">
Machine learning models to predict currency crises using macroeconomic indicators and historical data from multiple countries.
</div>

<div class="project-buttons">
<a href="projects/currency-crisis.html" class="btn btn-success">View Project</a>
<a href="https://github.com/atharvacoolkarni/currency-crisis" class="btn btn-info" target="_blank">View GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>

### Economic Convergence Analysis

<div class="project-content">
<div class="project-excerpt project-excerpt--green">
Statistical analysis testing the convergence hypothesis across emerging and developed economies using panel data methods.
</div>

<div class="project-buttons">
<a href="projects/convergence-analysis.html" class="btn btn-success">View Project</a>
<a href="https://github.com/atharvacoolkarni/convergence" class="btn btn-info" target="_blank">View GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>

<h2 class="section-header">Work in Progress</h2>

### Flight Analysis

<div class="project-content">
<div class="project-excerpt project-excerpt--orange">
Exploratory data and machine learning analysis of flight delays and prediction patterns using commercial flight data.
</div>

<div class="project-buttons">
<a href="projects/flight-analysis.html" class="btn btn-success">View Project</a>
<a href="https://github.com/atharvacoolkarni/flight-analysis" class="btn btn-info" target="_blank">View GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>

### Traffic Prediction Model

<div class="project-content">
<div class="project-excerpt project-excerpt--purple">
Deep learning and machine learning models for traffic flow prediction using real-time traffic data and neural networks.
</div>

<div class="project-buttons">
<a href="projects/traffic-prediction.html" class="btn btn-success">View Project</a>
<a href="https://github.com/atharvacoolkarni/traffic-prediction" class="btn btn-info" target="_blank">View GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>
